labels.notes: Deanna Eileen Wicks 11:52am — 71-min comprehensive visit (mixed mental health + IIH workup). Visit type correctly identified as A004A (general re-assessment). SOAP and dx 300 (anxiety/non-psychotic) both OK. DEFECT (Class G billing K005 unit logic): K005 quantity=1 in saved billing, should be 2 (K005 = '30 minutes or major part thereof'; 71-min visit ≥ 60 min counselling component → 2 units). ROOT CAUSE: rule_engine.rs line 91-94 only scales K005/K013 quantity from duration when `assessment_code` itself is K005/K013. When K005 enters via Conditions::PrimaryMentalHealth (line 144-167), it's added with default quantity=1 via make_billing_code(). Fix: extend counselling_units_from_duration() call to fire when K005/K007 come via the conditions branch.
